highlights.headline: Chicago Bulls vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chicago Bulls vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/04/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Rob Dillingham scored a career-high 26 points and the Chicago Bulls ended a seven-game skid, pounding the NBA-worst Washington Wizards 129-98 on Tuesday night in the opener of a two-game set.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bulls end 7-game skid in first game since front-office shake-up, pounding NBA-worst Wizards 129-98

headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes scored 25 points, Brandon Ingram finished with 23 and the Toronto Raptors beat Miami 121-95 on Tuesday night, an outcome that locked the Heat into the play-in tournament for a fourth consecutive season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raptors roll past Heat 121-95, an outcome that locks Miami into the play-in tournament

headlines.description: — Jeremiah Fears set a Pelicans rookie record for points in a game with 40, and New Orleans snapped an eight-game losing streak on Tuesday night with a 156-137 victory over the Utah Jazz, who lost their 10th straight.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jeremiah Fears sets a franchise rookie mark with 40 points as the Pelicans top the Jazz 156-137

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry scored 17 points with a pair of four-point plays in his second game back from a right knee injury, and the Golden State Warriors held off the Sacramento Kings 110-105 on Tuesday night to snap a four-game losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Curry scores 17 points with two 4-point plays in second game back from injury, Warriors beat Kings
